response.overview: 'The Bridge' is a short film about a young woman who steps off her everyday path when she hears a mysterious phone ringing in the forest. She follows it through the trees and crosses into a surreal, shifting world of paper and texture, where inspiration resides but cannot be manifested. Made with mixed-media animation, 'The Bridge' is a meditation on the creative act as a passage between fantasy and reality.
response.title: The Bridge
